The Strategic Position

Between Beverly Hills
and Every LA Venue

9432 Oakmore Rd sits in the exact center of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Los Angeles footprint. SoFi Stadium to the southwest. Rose Bowl to the northeast. Beverly Hills fine dining and the Beverly Center five minutes in any direction.

The property fits an entire delegation, executive team, or extended family — 5 bedrooms in the main residence plus a fully independent detached guest house with its own entrance, kitchen, and bath. Gated compound with space for multiple vehicles and EV charging.

FIFA World Cup 2026 Housing FAQ

Common Questions

Where should I stay for FIFA World Cup 2026 in Los Angeles? +

The Beverly Hills / Beverlywood corridor is the optimal base — 15 min from SoFi Stadium, 35 min from Rose Bowl, and surrounded by world-class dining, shopping, and nightlife. 9432 Oakmore Rd is a fully furnished gated compound at $34,999/month for the FIFA window.

How far is Beverly Hills from SoFi Stadium (FIFA 2026)? +

~8 miles. Approximately 15–20 minutes by car. Beverly Hills adjacent properties like Beverlywood (90035) offer the best combination of luxury, proximity to both venues, and access to LA's best amenities.

Can I rent a luxury home for the full FIFA World Cup 2026 window? +

Yes. Minimum lease is 30 days. The full FIFA window (June–August) runs 60–90 days — extended stay rates are available for multi-month commitments. Inquire via WhatsApp for exact availability and terms.

What FIFA World Cup 2026 housing is available near Los Angeles venues? +

Available now: 9432 Oakmore Rd — 5BR/6BA gated compound, 4,492 sq ft, heated pool, fully furnished, $34,999/month. Accommodates delegations, executive teams, and extended families. Detached guest house included.

What is the pricing for luxury FIFA World Cup housing in Los Angeles? +

Luxury Beverly Hills adjacent rentals for the FIFA window run $30,000–$45,000+/month for 4,000+ sq ft fully furnished properties. 9432 Oakmore Rd is $34,999/month — competitively priced for its specification and location.
